summary: exclusion_list 是唯一生产库，8575 行、6 州，staging 与 main 严格一致，无额外州、无全字段重复行。项目目录仅 ~/exclusion-list。

other_aiden_databases.aidendb: pgbench benchmark tables only — not exclusion data
other_aiden_databases.note: Shared server has many team databases; only exclusion_list is used for this project.

recommended_actions: Keep using database exclusion_list only; do not load into aiden/aidendb.
Each colleague state: integrate once in git repo, validate locally, then sync via deploy/run_full_deploy.sh.
Never append colleague CSVs without updating merge SQL state list and load_cleaned_data state list.
